query:

  awayModelSpread = -1.5,
  homeModelSpread = 1.5,
  modelAwaySpreadOdds = '+206.50',
  modelHomeSpreadOdds = '-206.50',
  modelTotal = 7.5,
  modelOverOdds = '+132.15',
  modelUnderOdds = '-132.15',
  modelAwayML = '+107.51',
  modelHomeML = '-107.51',
  modelAwayPLOdds = '+206.50',
  modelHomePLOdds = '-206.50'
WHERE id = '2250006';
